## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, deps, config
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Test Plan

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Demo works locally (`npx http-server . --port 8281`)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, keys, credentials)
- [ ] SCSS changes are in `src/scss/` (not `src/css/`)
- [ ] `src/css/` is regenerated via `npm run build`
